data.title: Xian Yu Ge
data.synopsis:
Xian Yu Ge is a salted fish who boarded at his aunt's house and hangs around idly all day long. However, due to his unique style of doing things, he often encounters survival crisis, and is always working around the island. During this process, Xian Yu Ge gradually becomes acquainted with the strange residents of the island, and he slowly gains family affection and friendship with them. With the arrival of the annual Fish God Festival, the hilarious daily story of Xian Yu Ge unfolds.

(Source: bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Bai Shou Zong Dong Yuan: Konglong Yongshi Dang An
Bai Shou Zongdongyuan Konglong Yongshi Dang An
百兽总动员恐龙勇士档案

data.title: Bai Shou Zong Dong Yuan: Konglong Yongshi Dang An
data.title_japanese: 百兽总动员恐龙勇士档案
title_synonyms: Bai Shou Zongdongyuan Konglong Yongshi Dang An
data.synopsis:
This series tells the sci-fi story of three friends who grow up alongside alien dragons and protect their home. The protagonists, Long Xingzai, Xiaomili, and Siyanzai, are best friends living on Dinosaur Island. One day, Long Xingzai encounters a mysterious spaceship. This enigmatic spaceship belongs to the dragons of Dinosaur Planet: Flame Beast, Lightning Beast, and Rock Beast. It turns out that Dinosaur Planet has been destroyed by the villainous Shadow Captain, and to save their home, the dragons decide to travel to Earth to find new dinosaur warriors. By chance, Long Xingzai becomes a dinosaur warrior protecting the universe! Can they overcome the numerous difficulties and challenges? The exciting adventure has begun, go for it, young warriors!

(Source: Douban, translated)
